classes.name: UniSpeechSamePadLayer
classes.rationale: Strips trailing padding from a tensor; trivial slice op, no kernel.

classes.name: UniSpeechPositionalConvEmbedding
classes.rationale: Conv1d with weight_norm + GELU activation (feat_extract_activation default 'gelu'); kb-nano lacks weight-norm parametrization wrapper, but compute is conv1d + gelu.

classes.name: UniSpeechNoLayerNormConvLayer
classes.rationale: Conv1d + GELU activation; no LayerNorm.

classes.name: UniSpeechLayerNormConvLayer
classes.rationale: Conv1d + LayerNorm + GELU activation (over channel dim with transpose).

classes.name: UniSpeechGroupNormConvLayer
classes.rationale: Conv1d + GroupNorm + GELU activation.

classes.name: UniSpeechFeatureEncoder
classes.rationale: Wiring class composing the *ConvLayer modules above into a stack.

classes.name: UniSpeechFeatureProjection
classes.rationale: LayerNorm + Linear projection + Dropout; standard ops.

classes.name: UniSpeechAttention
classes.rationale: Bart-style MHA with separate Q/K/V Linear and SDPA dispatch via ALL_ATTENTION_FUNCTIONS, non-causal encoder attention. Closest match: EncoderSelfAttention (separate q/k/v + DenseAttention sdpa); caveat: kb-nano EncoderSelfAttention transpose order differs slightly but compute is same.

classes.name: UniSpeechFeedForward
classes.rationale: fc1 + GELU (config.hidden_act='gelu') + fc2; two Linear+activation. Caveat: not BERT-style (no fold of LayerNorm, no residual inside), so encoder_mlp.py does not apply. Composes from L1/linear + L1/gelu.

classes.name: UniSpeechEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring class: post-norm style attention + LayerNorm + FeedForward + LayerNorm with residuals.

classes.name: UniSpeechEncoder
classes.rationale: Wiring class: pos_conv_embed + LayerNorm + stack of encoder layers.

classes.name: UniSpeechAttnAdapterLayer
classes.rationale: Adapter: LayerNorm + Linear + ReLU + Linear.

classes.name: UniSpeechEncoderLayerStableLayerNorm
classes.rationale: Wiring class: pre-norm variant with optional adapter.

classes.name: UniSpeechEncoderStableLayerNorm
classes.rationale: Wiring: stack of pre-norm encoder layers + final LayerNorm.

classes.name: UniSpeechGumbelVectorQuantizer
classes.rationale: Linear projection followed by gumbel softmax / argmax + codevector lookup; no specialized kb-nano kernel for VQ.

classes.name: UniSpeechModel
classes.rationale: Wiring: feature encoder + projection + masked spec aug + encoder.

classes.name: UniSpeechForPreTraining
classes.rationale: Wiring head over UniSpeechModel.

classes.name: UniSpeechForCTC
classes.rationale: Wiring CTC classification head.

classes.name: UniSpeechForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring sequence classification head.

classes.name: UniSpeechSatSamePadLayer
classes.rationale: Trivial padding strip (Wav2Vec2 sibling).

classes.name: UniSpeechSatPositionalConvEmbedding
classes.rationale: Weight-normed Conv1d + GELU activation (default feat_extract_activation='gelu').

classes.name: UniSpeechSatNoLayerNormConvLayer
classes.rationale: Conv1d + GELU.

classes.name: UniSpeechSatLayerNormConvLayer
classes.rationale: Conv1d + LayerNorm + GELU.

classes.name: UniSpeechSatGroupNormConvLayer
classes.rationale: Conv1d + GroupNorm + GELU.

classes.name: UniSpeechSatFeatureEncoder
classes.rationale: Wiring stack of *ConvLayer modules.

classes.name: UniSpeechSatFeatureProjection
classes.rationale: LayerNorm + Linear projection.

classes.name: UniSpeechSatAttention
classes.rationale: Same as UniSpeechAttention: separate Q/K/V Linear + SDPA, non-causal encoder MHA.

classes.name: UniSpeechSatFeedForward
classes.rationale: fc1 + GELU + fc2; hidden_act='gelu'.

classes.name: UniSpeechSatEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: post-norm encoder layer.

classes.name: UniSpeechSatEncoder
classes.rationale: Wiring: pos_conv_embed + LayerNorm + layer stack.

classes.name: UniSpeechSatAttnAdapterLayer
classes.rationale: LayerNorm + Linear + ReLU + Linear adapter.

classes.name: UniSpeechSatEncoderLayerStableLayerNorm
classes.rationale: Wiring: pre-norm encoder layer with optional adapter.

classes.name: UniSpeechSatEncoderStableLayerNorm
classes.rationale: Wiring: pre-norm stack + final LayerNorm.

classes.name: UniSpeechSatGumbelVectorQuantizer
classes.rationale: Linear + gumbel softmax + codevector lookup; no kb-nano VQ kernel.

classes.name: UniSpeechSatModel
classes.rationale: Wiring.

classes.name: UniSpeechSatForPreTraining
classes.rationale: Wiring head.

classes.name: UniSpeechSatForCTC
classes.rationale: Wiring CTC head.

classes.name: UniSpeechSatForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring head.

classes.name: UniSpeechSatForAudioFrameClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring head.

classes.name: AMSoftmaxLoss
classes.rationale: Loss module: cosine softmax with margin; not a forward-pass kernel.

classes.name: TDNNLayer
classes.rationale: Time-Delay NN layer: Conv1d (implemented as Linear with view) + ReLU.

classes.name: UniSpeechSatForXVector
classes.rationale: Wiring x-vector classifier.

classes.name: UnivNetKernelPredictorResidualBlock
classes.rationale: Dropout + Conv1d + LeakyReLU + Conv1d + LeakyReLU + residual.

classes.name: UnivNetKernelPredictor
classes.rationale: Stack of Conv1d residual blocks + LeakyReLU + final two Conv1d kernel/bias predictors.

classes.name: UnivNetLvcResidualBlock
classes.rationale: Location-variable convolution: Conv1d + LeakyReLU + custom unfold-based local conv (einsum) + gated activation (sigmoid * tanh). No kb-nano LVC kernel; specialized vocoder op.

classes.name: UnivNetLvcBlock
classes.rationale: Wiring: LeakyReLU + ConvTranspose1d + KernelPredictor + stack of LVC residual blocks.

classes.name: UnivNetModel
classes.rationale: Wiring: pre-conv1d + stack of LVC blocks + LeakyReLU + post-conv1d + tanh; no kb-nano vocoder pipeline yet.

classes.name: UperNetConvModule
classes.rationale: Conv2d + BatchNorm2d + ReLU; standard segmentation conv block.

classes.name: UperNetPyramidPoolingBlock
classes.rationale: AdaptiveAvgPool2d + UperNetConvModule (delegated).

classes.name: UperNetPyramidPoolingModule
classes.rationale: Stack of pyramid pooling blocks + bilinear interpolation up to input size.

classes.name: UperNetHead
classes.rationale: FPN+PSP head: lateral/fpn convs + bottlenecks + bilinear interpolation + Conv2d classifier; composes UperNetConvModule.

classes.name: UperNetFCNHead
classes.rationale: Stack of UperNetConvModule + Conv2d classifier; auxiliary head.

classes.name: UperNetForSemanticSegmentation
classes.rationale: Wiring: backbone + UperNetHead + optional UperNetFCNHead + final upsample to image size.

classes.name: UVDocConvLayer
classes.rationale: Conv2d + BatchNorm2d + ReLU (configurable activation, default 'relu').

classes.name: UVDocResidualBlock
classes.rationale: ResNet-style block of three UVDocConvLayer + residual + final ReLU.

classes.name: UVDocResNetStage
classes.rationale: Wiring: stack of UVDocResidualBlock per stage config.

classes.name: UVDocResNet
classes.rationale: Wiring: head conv layers + stages.

classes.name: UVDocBridgeBlock
classes.rationale: Wiring: stack of UVDocConvLayer with dilated convs.

classes.name: UVDocPointPositions2D
classes.rationale: Two Conv2d layers (one is UVDocConvLayer, one bare Conv2d) for predicting 2D points.

classes.name: UVDocBridge
classes.rationale: Wiring: stack of UVDocBridgeBlock.

classes.name: UVDocBackbone
classes.rationale: Wiring: UVDocResNet + UVDocBridge.

classes.name: UVDocHead
classes.rationale: Wiring: UVDocConvLayer connector + UVDocPointPositions2D.

classes.name: UVDocModel
classes.rationale: Wiring: backbone + head.

classes.name: VaultGemmaRMSNorm
classes.rationale: Gemma-style RMSNorm with (1 + weight) scale and (x*w).to(orig_dtype) cast order; matches GemmaRMSNorm exactly.

classes.name: VaultGemmaMLP
classes.rationale: SwiGLU MLP with config.hidden_activation='gelu_pytorch_tanh' -> down(act(gate)*up); matches Gemma4MLP (uses GeluAndMul('tanh')). Caveat: Gemma4MLP uses fused gate_up_proj while VaultGemma has separate gate_proj/up_proj weights, but compute is identical.

classes.name: VaultGemmaAttention
classes.rationale: GQA self-attention with separate q/k/v Linear, RoPE, optional softcap, sliding window for 'sliding_attention' layer types. Closest kb-nano file is LlamaAttention (config-driven QKV/RoPE/sliding); CAVEAT: kb-nano LlamaAttention does NOT support attn_logit_softcapping (Gemma2-specific). VaultGemma has no QK-norm. Does not use Gemma4Attention because that has q/k/v_norm and weight-less v_norm.

classes.name: VaultGemmaDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring class: input_layernorm + self_attn + pre_feedforward_layernorm + mlp.

classes.name: VaultGemmaRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: Standard NeoX-style RoPE with default rope_type; no YaRN. Maps to L1/rotary_emb.

classes.name: VaultGemmaTextScaledWordEmbedding
classes.rationale: Embedding layer with multiplicative scale by sqrt(hidden_size); standard nn.Embedding output * scalar.

classes.name: VaultGemmaModel
classes.rationale: Wiring: scaled embedding + decoder layer stack + final RMSNorm.

classes.name: VaultGemmaForCausalLM
classes.rationale: Wiring: VaultGemmaModel + lm_head.

classes.name: VibeVoiceAcousticTokenizerRMSNorm
classes.rationale: Standard Llama-style RMSNorm: x * rsqrt(var+eps), then weight * x.to(dtype). Inherits from LlamaRMSNorm in modular.

classes.name: VibeVoiceAcousticTokenizerFeedForward
classes.rationale: linear1 + activation + linear2; config.hidden_act='gelu' (default). Two-layer non-gated FFN.

classes.name: VibeVoiceAcousticTokenizerCausalConv1d
classes.rationale: Conv1d with explicit causal left-padding via cache or F.pad.

classes.name: VibeVoiceAcousticTokenizerCausalConvTranspose1d
classes.rationale: ConvTranspose1d with right-side padding strip for causal upsampling.

classes.name: VibeVoiceAcousticTokenizerConvNext1dLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: RMSNorm + CausalConv1d (mixer) + gamma + RMSNorm + FeedForward + ffn_gamma; ConvNeXt-1D block. All ops covered by sub-modules.

classes.name: VibeVoiceAcousticTokenizerEncoderStem
classes.rationale: Wiring: CausalConv1d + stack of ConvNext1dLayer.

classes.name: VibeVoiceAcousticTokenizerEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: downsampling CausalConv1d + stack of ConvNext1dLayer.

classes.name: VibeVoiceAcousticTokenizerEncoderModel
classes.rationale: Wiring: stem + encoder layers + head; pure conv encoder.

classes.name: VibeVoiceAcousticTokenizerDecoderStem
classes.rationale: Wiring: input CausalConv1d + ConvNext1dLayer stack.

classes.name: VibeVoiceAcousticTokenizerDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: upsampling CausalConvTranspose1d + ConvNext1dLayer stack.

classes.name: VibeVoiceAcousticTokenizerDecoderModel
classes.rationale: Wiring: stem + decoder layers + head.

classes.name: VibeVoiceAcousticTokenizerModel
classes.rationale: Wiring: encoder + decoder for VAE-style audio tokenizer; encode/decode methods.

classes.name: VibeVoiceAsrRMSNorm
classes.rationale: Inherits Qwen2RMSNorm in modular: standard Llama-style RMSNorm.

classes.name: VibeVoiceAsrMultiModalProjector
classes.rationale: Multi-modal projector: Linear projection (vision/audio features -> text dim).

classes.name: VibeVoiceAsrFeedForward
classes.rationale: Two-layer non-gated FFN; config.hidden_act='gelu' default (inherits VibeVoiceAcousticTokenizerFeedForward).

classes.name: VibeVoiceAsrCausalConv1d
classes.rationale: Conv1d with causal left-padding.

classes.name: VibeVoiceAsrConvNext1dLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: RMSNorm + CausalConv1d + RMSNorm + FeedForward + scale gammas; ConvNeXt-1D block.

classes.name: VibeVoiceAsrForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: Wiring: VibeVoiceAcousticTokenizerEncoder + projector + Qwen LLM (via AudioFlamingo3ForConditionalGeneration parent in modular).

classes.name: VideoLlama3VisionRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: Inherits from VisionRotaryEmbedding (Qwen2-VL): 2D height/width frequency cache. Maps to L1/vision_rotary_emb.py.

classes.name: VideoLlama3VisionEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Patch embedding: Conv2d (kernel=patch_size, stride=patch_size); flatten + transpose.

classes.name: VideoLlama3VisionMLP
classes.rationale: fc1 + GELU('tanh') + fc2 (config.hidden_act='gelu_pytorch_tanh'). Inherits from SiglipMLP. CAVEAT: kb-nano vision_mlp.py supports configurable act (defaults QuickGELU); for paper purposes the structural match is fc1+act+fc2 with bias.

classes.name: VideoLlama3VisionAttention
classes.rationale: Vision attention with separate q/k/v Linear, vision RoPE, cu_seqlens varlen, non-causal. Inherits from SiglipAttention. Maps to vision_attention.py (Qwen2-VL/Qwen3-VL pattern). CAVEAT: kb-nano vision_attention uses fused QKVParallelLinear; HF version is unfused but compute is identical.

classes.name: VideoLlama3VisionEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: LayerNorm + self_attn + LayerNorm + mlp; pre-norm vision encoder block (inherits SiglipEncoderLayer).

classes.name: VideoLlama3VisionEncoder
classes.rationale: Wiring: stack of VideoLlama3VisionEncoderLayer (inherits SiglipEncoder).

classes.name: VideoLlama3VisionModel
classes.rationale: Wiring: embeddings + encoder + post-norm.

classes.name: VideoLlama3Projector
classes.rationale: Vision-to-LLM projector: pre-norm + Linear + GELU + Linear + post-norm.

classes.name: VideoLlama3Model
classes.rationale: Wiring: vision_tower + projector + Qwen2 LLM (inherits Qwen2VLModel).

classes.name: VideoLlama3ForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: Wiring: VideoLlama3Model + lm_head; M-RoPE generation.

classes.name: VideoLlavaMultiModalProjector
classes.rationale: Two-layer projector: Linear + GELU + Linear (config.projector_hidden_act='gelu' default).

classes.name: VideoLlavaModel
classes.rationale: Wiring: vision_tower (CLIP/SigLIP) + projector + LLM (via AutoModel).

classes.name: VideoLlavaForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: Wiring: VideoLlavaModel + lm_head; multimodal generation.

classes.name: VideoMAEEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Wiring: VideoMAEPatchEmbeddings + sinusoidal position embeddings (no learnable token here).

classes.name: VideoMAEPatchEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Tubelet patch embedding via Conv3d(kernel=(tubelet_size, patch, patch)).

classes.name: VideoMAESelfAttention
classes.rationale: Separate Q/K/V Linear + SDPA + dropout, non-causal. Same pattern as ViTSelfAttention; closest match is EncoderSelfAttention (separate q/k/v + DenseAttention sdpa, bias=qkv_bias).

classes.name: VideoMAESelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + Dropout; NO LayerNorm (pre-norm style: layernorm is in VideoMAELayer). Does NOT match encoder_attention.py:EncoderSelfOutput (which folds LayerNorm).

classes.name: VideoMAEAttention
classes.rationale: Wiring class around VideoMAESelfAttention + VideoMAESelfOutput.

classes.name: VideoMAEIntermediate
classes.rationale: Linear + GELU (hidden_act='gelu').

classes.name: VideoMAEOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + Dropout + residual (residual outside, no LayerNorm here -- pre-norm).

classes.name: VideoMAELayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: pre-norm ViT block (layernorm_before + Attention; layernorm_after + Intermediate + Output).

classes.name: VideoMAEEncoder
classes.rationale: Wiring: stack of VideoMAELayer.

classes.name: VideoMAEModel
classes.rationale: Wiring: embeddings + encoder + final LayerNorm.

classes.name: VideoMAEDecoder
classes.rationale: Wiring: decoder_embed + decoder_pos_embed + stack of VideoMAELayer + LayerNorm + Linear pred head.

classes.name: VideoMAEForPreTraining
classes.rationale: Wiring: VideoMAEModel encoder + decoder.

classes.name: VideoMAEForVideoClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring: VideoMAEModel + classifier head.

classes.name: VideomtPatchEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Patch embedding via Conv2d (inherits from EomtPatchEmbeddings).

classes.name: VideomtEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Wiring: cls_token + patch_embeddings + register tokens + position embeddings (DINOv2-style, inherits EomtEmbeddings).

classes.name: VideomtMLP
classes.rationale: fc1 + GELU + fc2 (config.hidden_act='gelu' default); inherits from EomtMLP. Two-layer non-gated.

classes.name: VideomtGatedMLP
classes.rationale: SwiGLU FFN: weights_in -> chunk -> silu(x1)*x2 -> weights_out. Same compute as silu_and_mul gate but with single fused weights_in (gate||up) and bias=True.

classes.name: VideomtAttention
classes.rationale: Separate Q/K/V Linear + SDPA, non-causal. Same as ViT pattern; closest match is EncoderSelfAttention (config-driven q/k/v, sdpa).

classes.name: VideomtSwiGLUFFN
classes.rationale: Same as VideomtGatedMLP: SwiGLU with weights_in/out (used when use_swiglu_ffn=True).

classes.name: VideomtLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: pre-norm ViT block with LayerScale + DropPath; inherits EomtLayer.

classes.name: VideomtLayerScale
classes.rationale: Element-wise scale by learnable lambda1 parameter; trivial multiply, no kb-nano file.

classes.name: VideomtLayerNorm2d
classes.rationale: Channel-last LayerNorm via permute(0,2,3,1) -> layer_norm -> permute back.

classes.name: VideomtScaleLayer
classes.rationale: ConvTranspose2d + GELU + Conv2d (depthwise) + VideomtLayerNorm2d.

classes.name: VideomtScaleBlock
classes.rationale: Wiring: stack of VideomtScaleLayer.

classes.name: VideomtMaskHead
classes.rationale: Three-layer MLP head: fc1+act + fc2+act + fc3.

classes.name: VideomtHungarianMatcher
classes.rationale: Bipartite matching for segmentation queries; CPU-side scipy linear_sum_assignment usually.

classes.name: VideomtLoss
classes.rationale: Loss computation; not a forward kernel.

classes.name: VideomtForUniversalSegmentation
classes.rationale: Wiring: video segmentation model with backbone + scale blocks + mask head.

classes.name: ViltEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Combined text+image embeddings: TextEmbeddings + ViltPatchEmbeddings + position/modality embeddings; concat & dropout.

classes.name: TextEmbeddings
classes.rationale: BERT-like word+position+token_type embeddings + LayerNorm + Dropout. Matches EncoderEmbeddingsBase shape.

classes.name: ViltPatchEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv2d patch embedding.

classes.name: ViltSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Separate Q/K/V Linear + dropout(softmax(QK^T/sqrt(d))) * V, non-causal. Closest match: EncoderSelfAttention (separate q/k/v + DenseAttention sdpa).

classes.name: ViltSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + Dropout, NO LayerNorm (pre-norm style; layernorm is in ViltLayer). Does NOT match encoder_attention.py:EncoderSelfOutput.

classes.name: ViltAttention
classes.rationale: Wiring class around ViltSelfAttention + ViltSelfOutput.

classes.name: ViltIntermediate
classes.rationale: Linear + GELU (config.hidden_act='gelu').

classes.name: ViltOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + Dropout + residual (no LayerNorm; pre-norm).

classes.name: ViltLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: pre-norm ViT-style block with two LayerNorms.

classes.name: ViltEncoder
classes.rationale: Wiring: stack of ViltLayer.

classes.name: ViltModel
classes.rationale: Wiring.

classes.name: ViltPooler
classes.rationale: First-token pooling: Linear + Tanh.

classes.name: ViltForMaskedLM
classes.rationale: Wiring head.

classes.name: ViltPredictionHeadTransform
classes.rationale: Linear + activation + LayerNorm.

classes.name: ViltMLMHead
classes.rationale: Wiring: transform + decoder Linear.

classes.name: ViltForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: Wiring head.

classes.name: ViltForImageAndTextRetrieval
classes.rationale: Wiring head.

classes.name: ViltForImagesAndTextClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring head.

classes.name: ViltForTokenClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring head.

classes.name: VipLlavaMultiModalProjector
classes.rationale: Vision feature projector: LayerNorm + Linear + GELU + Linear (config.projector_hidden_act='gelu' default).

classes.name: VipLlavaModel
classes.rationale: Wiring: vision_tower (CLIP variant) + projector + LLM (Llama via AutoModel); inherits LlavaModel.

classes.name: VipLlavaForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: Wiring: VipLlavaModel + lm_head.

classes.name: VisionEncoderDecoderModel
classes.rationale: Pure wiring shell: holds an encoder (e.g., ViT) + decoder (e.g., GPT2/BART) instantiated via AutoModel; no own kernels.

classes.name: VisionTextDualEncoderModel
classes.rationale: Pure wiring: vision_model + text_model + visual_projection (Linear) + text_projection (Linear) for CLIP-style dual encoder.

classes.name: VisualBertEmbeddings
classes.rationale: BERT-style word+position+token_type embeddings + LayerNorm + visual feature embeddings (Linear projector + visual position/type). Maps to EncoderEmbeddingsBase plus extra Linear for visual features.

classes.name: VisualBertSelfAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-style separate Q/K/V Linear + softmax(QK/sqrt(d)) + V; bidirectional. Direct match to EncoderSelfAttention (BERT-derived design).

classes.name: VisualBertSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + Dropout + LayerNorm(hidden+input); BERT post-norm pattern. Matches encoder_attention.py:EncoderSelfOutput exactly.

classes.name: VisualBertAttention
classes.rationale: Wiring class around VisualBertSelfAttention + VisualBertSelfOutput; matches encoder_attention.py:EncoderAttention.

classes.name: VisualBertIntermediate
classes.rationale: Linear + GELU (config.hidden_act='gelu'); matches encoder_mlp.py:EncoderIntermediate.

classes.name: VisualBertOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + Dropout + LayerNorm(hidden+input); matches encoder_mlp.py:EncoderOutput exactly.

classes.name: VisualBertLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: BERT post-norm encoder block (Attention + Intermediate + Output).

classes.name: VisualBertEncoder
classes.rationale: Wiring: stack of VisualBertLayer.

classes.name: VisualBertPooler
classes.rationale: First-token pooler: Linear + Tanh.

classes.name: VisualBertPredictionHeadTransform
classes.rationale: Linear + activation + LayerNorm.

classes.name: VisualBertLMPredictionHead
classes.rationale: Wiring: transform + decoder Linear with bias.

classes.name: VisualBertPreTrainingHeads
classes.rationale: Wiring: LMPredictionHead + seq_relationship Linear.

classes.name: VisualBertModel
classes.rationale: Wiring: embeddings + encoder + pooler.

classes.name: VisualBertForPreTraining
classes.rationale: Wiring head.

classes.name: VisualBertForMultipleChoice
classes.rationale: Wiring head.

classes.name: VisualBertForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: Wiring head.

classes.name: VisualBertForVisualReasoning
classes.rationale: Wiring head.

classes.name: VisualBertRegionToPhraseAttention
classes.rationale: Single-head cross-attention scoring: q_proj/k_proj Linear + softmax over keys for region-phrase alignment.

classes.name: VisualBertForRegionToPhraseAlignment
classes.rationale: Wiring head.

classes.name: ViTEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Wiring: cls_token + ViTPatchEmbeddings + position embeddings + (optional) mask token + Dropout.

classes.name: ViTPatchEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv2d(kernel=patch_size, stride=patch_size) for image-to-patch projection.

classes.name: ViTSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Separate Q/K/V Linear (bias=qkv_bias) + SDPA dispatch via ALL_ATTENTION_FUNCTIONS, non-causal. Closest match: EncoderSelfAttention (separate q/k/v + DenseAttention).

classes.name: ViTSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + Dropout, NO LayerNorm (pre-norm style: layernorm placed in ViTLayer).

classes.name: ViTAttention
classes.rationale: Wiring class around ViTSelfAttention + ViTSelfOutput.

classes.name: ViTIntermediate
classes.rationale: Linear + GELU (config.hidden_act='gelu').

classes.name: ViTOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + Dropout + residual; no LayerNorm here (pre-norm).

classes.name: ViTLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: pre-norm ViT block (layernorm_before + Attention; layernorm_after + Intermediate + Output). Closest holistic match would be L3/vit_encoder_block.py but that uses fused-QKV attention; ViTLayer here uses separate QKV via ViTSelfAttention.

classes.name: ViTEncoder
classes.rationale: Wiring: stack of ViTLayer.

classes.name: ViTModel
classes.rationale: Wiring: embeddings + encoder + final LayerNorm + optional pooler.

classes.name: ViTPooler
classes.rationale: First-token pooler: Linear + Tanh.

classes.name: ViTForMaskedImageModeling
classes.rationale: Wiring head.

classes.name: ViTForImageClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring classification head.

classes.name: ViTMAEEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Wiring: cls_token + ViTMAEPatchEmbeddings + sinusoidal pos_embed + random masking.

classes.name: ViTMAEPatchEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv2d patch projection.

classes.name: ViTMAESelfAttention
classes.rationale: Same as ViTSelfAttention: separate Q/K/V Linear + SDPA, non-causal.

classes.name: ViTMAESelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + Dropout, NO LayerNorm (pre-norm).

classes.name: ViTMAEAttention
classes.rationale: Wiring class.

classes.name: ViTMAEIntermediate
classes.rationale: Linear + GELU (hidden_act='gelu').

classes.name: ViTMAEOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + Dropout + residual.

classes.name: ViTMAELayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: pre-norm ViT block.

classes.name: ViTMAEEncoder
classes.rationale: Wiring: stack of ViTMAELayer.

classes.name: ViTMAEModel
classes.rationale: Wiring.

classes.name: ViTMAEDecoder
classes.rationale: Wiring: decoder_embed Linear + mask_token + sin-cos pos_embed + ViTMAELayer stack + final LayerNorm + decoder_pred Linear; bicubic interpolation for resolution adaptation.

classes.name: ViTMAEForPreTraining
classes.rationale: Wiring: encoder + decoder + reconstruction loss.

classes.name: ViTMSNEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Wiring: cls_token + ViTMSNPatchEmbeddings + position embeddings + Dropout.

classes.name: ViTMSNPatchEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv2d patch projection.

classes.name: ViTMSNSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Separate Q/K/V Linear + SDPA, non-causal (copied from ViTSelfAttention).

classes.name: ViTMSNSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + Dropout, NO LayerNorm (pre-norm).

classes.name: ViTMSNAttention
classes.rationale: Wiring class.

classes.name: ViTMSNIntermediate
classes.rationale: Linear + GELU (hidden_act='gelu').

classes.name: ViTMSNOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + Dropout + residual.

classes.name: ViTMSNLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: pre-norm ViT block.

classes.name: ViTMSNEncoder
classes.rationale: Wiring: stack of layers.

classes.name: ViTMSNModel
classes.rationale: Wiring.

classes.name: ViTMSNForImageClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring head.

classes.name: VitDetEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv2d patch projection + optional 2D abs pos embeddings + bicubic interpolation.

classes.name: VitDetAttention
classes.rationale: Fused-QKV Linear + manual matmul softmax (no SDPA dispatch); supports decomposed relative positional embeddings (Detectron2 style). No direct kb-nano equivalent (relative-pos+fused-QKV); composes from L1 ops.

classes.name: VitDetDropPath
classes.rationale: Stochastic depth utility; trivial random drop.

classes.name: VitDetLayerNorm
classes.rationale: Channel-first LayerNorm variant for (N,C,H,W) tensors; mean/var over channel dim. No kb-nano LayerNorm2d (channel-first variant); composes.

classes.name: VitDetResBottleneckBlock
classes.rationale: 1x1 conv -> activation -> 3x3 conv -> activation -> 1x1 conv + VitDetLayerNorm; ResNet-style bottleneck in window blocks.

classes.name: VitDetMlp
classes.rationale: Linear + GELU + Linear; hidden_act='gelu' default.

classes.name: VitDetLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: ViT-style block with optional window partition + LayerNorm + Attention + (optional) ResBottleneck + MLP.

classes.name: VitDetEncoder
classes.rationale: Wiring: stack of VitDetLayer.

classes.name: VitDetModel
classes.rationale: Wiring.

classes.name: VitDetBackbone
classes.rationale: Wiring backbone wrapper.

classes.name: VitMatteBasicConv3x3
classes.rationale: Conv2d(3x3) + BatchNorm2d + ReLU.

classes.name: VitMatteConvStream
classes.rationale: Wiring: stack of VitMatteBasicConv3x3 producing multi-scale features.

classes.name: VitMatteFusionBlock
classes.rationale: Bilinear upsample + concat + VitMatteBasicConv3x3.

classes.name: VitMatteHead
classes.rationale: Conv2d + BatchNorm + ReLU + Conv2d (final output).

classes.name: VitMatteDetailCaptureModule
classes.rationale: Wiring: ConvStream + FusionBlock stack + Head.

classes.name: VitMatteForImageMatting
classes.rationale: Wiring: backbone (VitDet) + DetailCaptureModule.

classes.name: VitPoseSimpleDecoder
classes.rationale: Bilinear upsample + ReLU + Conv2d for keypoint heatmap prediction.

classes.name: VitPoseClassicDecoder
classes.rationale: ConvTranspose2d + BatchNorm + ReLU stack + final Conv2d for heatmap output.

classes.name: VitPoseForPoseEstimation
classes.rationale: Wiring: VitPoseBackbone (backbone via AutoBackbone) + decoder (Simple or Classic).

classes.name: VitPoseBackbonePatchEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv2d patch projection (with padding).

classes.name: VitPoseBackboneEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Wiring: PatchEmbeddings + position embeddings + Dropout.

classes.name: VitPoseBackboneSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Separate Q/K/V Linear + SDPA, non-causal (copied from ViTSelfAttention).

classes.name: VitPoseBackboneSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + Dropout, NO LayerNorm (pre-norm).

classes.name: VitPoseBackboneAttention
classes.rationale: Wiring class.

classes.name: VitPoseNaiveMoe
classes.rationale: Naive MoE: per-expert Linear + selection mask. No fused MoE kernel for this naive routing pattern; composes.

classes.name: VitPoseBackboneMoeMLP
classes.rationale: fc1 + GELU + fc2(shared) + naive MoE branch (concat); two-layer + per-dataset experts.

classes.name: VitPoseBackboneMLP
classes.rationale: Linear + GELU + Linear (hidden_act='gelu').

classes.name: VitPoseBackboneLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: pre-norm ViT-style block, MoE-aware MLP routing.

classes.name: VitPoseBackboneEncoder
classes.rationale: Wiring: stack of VitPoseBackboneLayer.

classes.name: VitPoseBackbone
classes.rationale: Wiring backbone.

classes.name: VitsWaveNet
classes.rationale: WaveNet with dilated Conv1d + tanh*sigmoid gating. No kb-nano WaveNet kernel.

classes.name: VitsPosteriorEncoder
classes.rationale: Conv1d projections wrapping VitsWaveNet for posterior encoder.

classes.name: HifiGanResidualBlock
classes.rationale: Dilated Conv1d residual block with LeakyReLU; HiFi-GAN style.

classes.name: VitsHifiGan
classes.rationale: HiFi-GAN vocoder: Conv1d + ConvTranspose1d upsampling + ResidualBlocks + final tanh.

classes.name: VitsResidualCouplingLayer
classes.rationale: Affine coupling flow layer: Conv1d projection + WaveNet + Conv1d.

classes.name: VitsResidualCouplingBlock
classes.rationale: Wiring: stack of coupling layers + flips.

classes.name: VitsDilatedDepthSeparableConv
classes.rationale: Depthwise dilated Conv1d + LayerNorm + GELU + Conv1d 1x1; stack.

classes.name: VitsConvFlow
classes.rationale: Conv1d-based piecewise rational quadratic spline flow.

classes.name: VitsElementwiseAffine
classes.rationale: Element-wise affine flow layer; trivial multiply/add.

classes.name: VitsStochasticDurationPredictor
classes.rationale: Wiring: Conv1d + spline flows + DDSConv stack.

classes.name: VitsDurationPredictor
classes.rationale: Conv1d + ReLU + LayerNorm stack producing duration logits.

classes.name: VitsAttention
classes.rationale: Custom MHA with relative-position embeddings (window-based) and absolute<->relative position transforms; bmm-based, no SDPA. No direct kb-nano attention with this rel-pos scheme; composes from L1 ops.

classes.name: VitsFeedForward
classes.rationale: Conv1d-based FFN with padding masks; config.hidden_act='relu' (default for VITS). NOT a Linear-based MLP.

classes.name: VitsEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: post-norm encoder block (Attention + LayerNorm + FeedForward + LayerNorm).

classes.name: VitsEncoder
classes.rationale: Wiring: stack of VitsEncoderLayer.

classes.name: VitsTextEncoder
classes.rationale: Embedding + VitsEncoder + Conv1d projection to flow params.

classes.name: VitsModel
classes.rationale: Wiring: TextEncoder + StochasticDurationPredictor + ResidualCouplingBlock + PosteriorEncoder + HifiGan.

classes.name: VivitTubeletEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv3d-based tubelet embedding for video.

classes.name: VivitEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Wiring: cls_token + VivitTubeletEmbeddings + position embeddings + Dropout.

classes.name: VivitSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Separate Q/K/V Linear + SDPA, non-causal (ViT-style).

classes.name: VivitSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + Dropout, NO LayerNorm (pre-norm).

classes.name: VivitAttention
classes.rationale: Wiring class.

classes.name: VivitIntermediate
classes.rationale: Linear + GELU('tanh') + Dropout (config.hidden_act='gelu_fast'). CAVEAT: 'gelu_fast' approximation differs slightly from kb-nano L1/gelu(approximate='none'); semantics nearly identical, structural pattern matches.

classes.name: VivitOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + Dropout + residual.

classes.name: VivitLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: pre-norm ViT block.

classes.name: VivitEncoder
classes.rationale: Wiring: stack of VivitLayer.

classes.name: VivitPooler
classes.rationale: First-token pooler: Linear + Tanh.

classes.name: VivitModel
classes.rationale: Wiring.

classes.name: VivitForVideoClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring head.

classes.name: VJEPA2PatchEmbeddings3D
classes.rationale: Tubelet Conv3d patch embedding for video. Direct match: vjepa2_embeddings.py:VJEPA2PatchEmbeddings3D (uses L1/conv3d).

classes.name: VJEPA2Embeddings
classes.rationale: Wraps VJEPA2PatchEmbeddings3D with frame repeat for short videos. Direct match: vjepa2_embeddings.py:VJEPA2Embeddings.

classes.name: VJEPA2RopeAttention
classes.rationale: Vision attention with separate q/k/v Linear + 3D vjepa2 RoPE on Q,K + SDPA. Direct match: vjepa2_attention.py:VJEPA2RopeAttention; uses L1/vjepa2_rope.

classes.name: VJEPA2DropPath
classes.rationale: Stochastic depth utility (defined inside L3/vjepa2_layer.py:VJEPA2DropPath).

classes.name: VJEPA2MLP
classes.rationale: Two-layer MLP with GELU (config.hidden_act='gelu' default; 'gelu_new'->'tanh'). Direct match: vjepa2_mlp.py:VJEPA2MLP.

classes.name: VJEPA2Layer
classes.rationale: Pre-norm transformer block with DropPath + LayerNorm + RopeAttention + LayerNorm + MLP. Direct match: L3/vjepa2_layer.py:VJEPA2Layer.

classes.name: VJEPA2Encoder
classes.rationale: Wiring: patch embed + stack of VJEPA2Layer + final LayerNorm.

classes.name: VJEPA2PredictorEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Predictor input embedding: Linear projection + mask token embedding.

classes.name: VJEPA2Predictor
classes.rationale: Predictor module for V-JEPA 2 (joint-embedding self-supervised target prediction). L3/vjepa2_predictor.py exists.

classes.name: VJEPA2PoolerSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Pooler self-attention with separate q/k/v Linear + SDPA, no RoPE. Direct match: vjepa2_attention.py:VJEPA2PoolerSelfAttention.

classes.name: VJEPA2PoolerCrossAttention
classes.rationale: Pooler cross-attention with separate q/k/v Linear + SDPA. Direct match: vjepa2_attention.py:VJEPA2PoolerCrossAttention.

classes.name: VJEPA2PoolerSelfAttentionLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: LayerNorm + PoolerSelfAttention + LayerNorm + MLP.

classes.name: VJEPA2PoolerCrossAttentionLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: LayerNorm + PoolerCrossAttention + LayerNorm + MLP.

classes.name: VJEPA2AttentivePooler
classes.rationale: Wiring of cross-attention layer + N self-attention layers + query token. L3/vjepa2_pooler.py implements this.

classes.name: VJEPA2Model
classes.rationale: Wiring: VJEPA2Encoder + VJEPA2Predictor; L4/vjepa2.py is the kb-nano pipeline.

classes.name: VJEPA2ForVideoClassification
classes.rationale: Wiring: VJEPA2Model + VJEPA2AttentivePooler + classifier head.

classes.name: VoxtralAttention
classes.rationale: Whisper-encoder-style attention (inherits Qwen2AudioAttention which inherits WhisperAttention). Separate q/k/v Linear (k_proj has bias=False, q/v/out have bias), bidirectional non-causal, scaling baked into Q. Closest match: WhisperEncoderSelfAttention (uses fused QKVParallelLinear with bias=True; HF version unfused with k_proj bias=False -- caveat). Used only as encoder self-attention in this folder.

classes.name: VoxtralEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: Pre-norm encoder layer: LayerNorm + self_attn + LayerNorm + fc1 + activation + fc2 with dropout. config.activation_function='gelu' default. Whisper encoder pattern. CAVEAT: kb-nano L3/whisper_encoder_layer.py uses WhisperMLP (matches: GELU, fc1, fc2).

classes.name: VoxtralEncoder
classes.rationale: Wiring: Whisper-like audio encoder with conv1+conv2+pos_embed+layer stack.

classes.name: VoxtralMultiModalProjector
classes.rationale: Linear + GELU + Linear projector (config.projector_hidden_act='gelu' default).

classes.name: VoxtralForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: Wiring: VoxtralEncoder + projector + LLM (Llama via AutoModel).
